name: Pediatric Head Ultrasound
description: Head ultrasound for neonatal intracranial evaluation

findings.technique: Transfontanellar head ultrasound was performed through the anterior fontanelle.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: Lateral ventricles [are normal in size / no dilatation / no hemorrhage]. Third ventricle [normal].

sections.name: Parenchyma
sections.content: Brain parenchyma [shows normal echogenicity / no hemorrhage / no cystic changes].

sections.name: Germinal Matrix
sections.content: Germinal matrix [no echogenic focus / no hemorrhage].

impression:
1. Normal neonatal head ultrasound.
2. No intraventricular hemorrhage.
3. No structural abnormality.
